component.name: WineGUI
component.summary: WineGUI is a user-friendly WINE graphical interface

description.p: WineGUI is a friendly interface for Wine, letting you easily manage your Wine machines/bottles.
Features include an easy step-by-step wizard for creating a new machine, a built-in application list, editing machines and configuring a machine with a single click, and much more.

ul.li: Right-click context menu on the bottle list (Edit, Configure, Clone, Run..., Delete)
One-click DXVK GPU test in the application list
Performance overlay (HUD) options in the edit machine window
Single-click Wine Mono (re)install button in the Configure window
Restored main toolbar overflow menu and refreshed Configure sidebar layout
Faster startup via in-memory registry file caching
Various bug fixes and build/CI improvements
